case_title: BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. JOSEPH W. LUI et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2011 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-16-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-16-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $79.00) SERVED NOV-08-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BEADMAN, THOMAS S

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LUI, JOSEPH W. BEADMAN, THOMAS S STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 1/03/12 TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH W. LUI, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $89.00) SERVED NOV-08-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LUI, JOSEPH W.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUI, JOSEPH W. BEADMAN, THOMAS S $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $218.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,218.00, **JUDGMENT IS CORRECTED TO SHOW THE JUDGMENT AMOUNTS. IT IS NUNC PRO TUNC AS OF DECEMBER 16, 2011.** STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT LUI, JOSEPH W. BEADMAN, THOMAS S ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
